rulings.Case Title: IN RE: BELVA WATSON, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondents' Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Award Of Sanctions Against Petitioner For Filing And Pursuing A Frivolous Second Amended Petition For Personal Property Belonging To Decedent And Trust; For Declaratory Relief
rulings.Rulings: The motion for sanctions is granted in part. Prevailing party is to prepare an appropriate order, which is subject to the Court's review. Any party who wishes to argue the tentative ruling must notify the Court and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on 4/8/2014.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: BELVA WATSON, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent B. Watson'S Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To First Amended Petition To Recover Real And Personal Property Belonging To Decedent And Etc.
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. The prevailing party is to prepare an order. Any party who wishes to argue the tentative must notify the Court (415) 551-3702 by 5:00 p.m. on April 8, 2014.
